title: capsicum hebepodum
intro: Capsicum hebepodum is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, native to the tropical forests of Central America and the Caribbean. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Capsicum hebepodum include reducing pain and inflammation, treating fever, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
